evals.prompt: Issue #47을 구현하기 전에 기존 hybrid search 결정과 release blocker를 qgh 기록에서 조사해 구현 브리프를 만들어줘. 현재 코드와 충돌하는 지점은 별도로 표시해줘.
evals.expected_output: The agent should define a focused research question, inspect local snapshot limits, use exact and semantic queries, open every relied-on source, triangulate multiple issue/comment records, separate qgh history from current-code observations, and produce a cited implementation brief with gaps and focused gates.
expectations: Defines one research question and a small exact-plus-semantic query matrix
Opens every relied-on candidate and triangulates at least two sources when available
Uses the exact qgh get source_id plus --profile-id round trip and no invented qgh Issue, PR, or code command
Separates recorded qgh history, inference, current-code observations, contradictions, and gaps
Produces canonical citations, source versions, snapshot caveats, and focused verification gates

evals.prompt: 동시 query/sync publication snapshot 버그가 왜 생겼는지 과거 issue와 comment를 추적해서 재현 가설과 검증 체크리스트를 작성해줘. ranking score를 신뢰도로 해석하지 마.
evals.expected_output: The agent should search identifiers and rationale variants, use ranking only for candidate ordering, read authoritative bodies and parent context, distinguish observations from root-cause inference, include a disconfirming test, and cite canonical URLs and source versions with freshness/coverage caveats.
expectations: Treats ranking values only as candidate ordering signals and never as confidence
Reads authoritative source bodies and relevant parent issue context before synthesis, or refuses to claim findings when a dry run prevents those reads
Uses qgh get with emitted get_args.source_id and --profile-id get_args.profile_id, never --profile
Separates observations from the root-cause hypothesis and includes a disconfirming test
Returns canonical citations, source versions, freshness, coverage, and a verification checklist when evidence is available, otherwise marks each unavailable outcome as a gap
Does not add a live gh or code-history check unless current state or code comparison is requested and authorized

evals.prompt: README에서 qgh와 gh 역할을 어떻게 설명해야 하는지 과거 제품 결정을 조사해줘. 현재 GitHub 상태 확인이 필요하면 근거 공백으로 표시하고 쓰기는 하지 마.
evals.expected_output: The agent should synthesize qgh's local retrieval/citation role versus gh's live truth/write role from opened local sources, mark any current-state requirement as a separate unresolved gap, avoid GitHub writes and implicit live checks, and return a decision brief rather than a single unverified snippet.
expectations: Uses multiple opened qgh sources, or in a dry run plans exact get_args round trips and refuses to synthesize before opening them
Explains qgh as local retrieval/citation and gh as separate live truth/write tooling
Marks current GitHub state as a separate evidence gap unless explicitly checked
Performs no GitHub write or implicit live/network operation
